text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
It is the announcement day of my fan<n>results. With
many of my followers<n>having flocked to the venue,
the<n>signal of my advance is set to come!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
A beacon of smoke drifts into the sky.<n>Down with
the Golden Generation!<n>With sweat-drenched fists
clenched, I<n>vow to do battle with those mighty
foes!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Before this can be done, I must claim<n>the first of
the Classic Triple Crown<n>races, held atop the lush
greens of<n>Nakayama—the Satsuki Sho!
